apps.title: Subway Surfers City
apps.summary:
Billions of players can’t be wrong - run and jump back into the beloved world of Subway Surfers and rediscover your favorite endless running adventure with exciting new twists. Progress through fresh hurdles, reach new heights, and collect new characters!

Jake, Tricky, Fresh, and Yutani are ready - are you? Play Subway Surfers City now!

Key features:
- CHOOSE YOUR ADVENTURE: Switch seamlessly between thrilling endless runs chasing a new high score, or playing the all new City Tour!
- UNCOVER SECRETS: Stomp and jump for a new way to play this runner game. Reach new depths and heights as you discover hard-to-reach Secret Stars!
- COLLECT AND UPGRADE SURFERS & BOARDS: Each Surfer and Board has unique abilities, so upgrade and combine runners and boards to play your way! Collect them all, find Surfer and Board tokens to upgrade them all and build the strongest Crew!
- WIN WITH NEW POWER-UPS & PERKS: Pick up new power-ups for the most powerful runs. Bubblegum shields you, batteries superpower your hoverboard, and drones get you to the highest points of Subway City!
- UNLOCK LIVELY DISTRICTS: Explore all the secret corners of Subway City while running away from Guard and Dog. Earn XP to unlock new Districts!
- COMPLETE MISSIONS AND WIN REWARDS: The crew needs you to run your best! Play smart and finish missions to unlock new items and win big.
- CONQUER TRIALS: Are you ready to have your running skills challenged? Trials are adrenaline-pumping, limited runs that require your best performance to get the best rewards.
- PLAY OFFLINE: Subway Surfers City is available offline! Play without wifi or internet connection. Access to some features will be limited.

Download Subway Surfers City now and play for free! Some in-game items can also be purchased for real money.

apps.title: Hatch Dragons
apps.summary:
Discover Dragons like you’ve never seen before! Collect and care for hundreds of unique Dragons, uncovering their origins as they grow. From playful Cat Dragons to rare Bluebell Dragons, every new Dragon you hatch and raise brings this cozy, peaceful world to life.

Long ago, Dragons filled this enchanted forest, thriving alongside nature. Each evolved into forms as diverse as the surrounding flora and fauna. Some shimmered with glittering scales, others were soft and furry, and some even bloomed with flowers or mushrooms.

When nearby mining drove the Dragons away, fog crept in and the forest fell silent for years. Now, join Liv the Elf to lift the fog, summon the Dragons home, and help the forest sparkle with life once more.

GAME HIGHLIGHTS
✨ Summon Dragons: Help Liv mix elements, gems, and more to call Dragons of all shapes, forms, and rarities to your forest.
💖 Raise Dragons: Hatch eggs, feed your Dragons, and help them grow into magical, bonded companions.
📖 Collect Hundreds of Dragons: Discover a magical array of Dragons that evolved alongside nature.
🔮 Uncover Lore: Reveal charming legends and little-known facts about your Dragons.
🌲 Explore and Restore: Clear the fog and help the forest awaken with life, magic, and folkloric friends.
🍄 Decorate Your Forest: Adorn your forest with plants and decor that possess magical abilities to help you progress.
🎁 Missions and Events: Missions, updates, and limited-time events bring exciting new Dragons, décor, and rewards. There’s always something new to discover!

If you love Dragons, cozy collection games, and relaxing adventures, you will be enchanted by Hatch Dragons.

*****
Hatch Dragons is developed and published by Runaway.
This game is free to play but does contain in-app purchases. If you run into any issues while playing or you have any suggestions, please reach out to us at support@runaway.zendesk.com

apps.title: Titan Rush
apps.summary:
The tides swallowed up civilization, and Chimera tore apart our homes. The world fell silent, and hope sank beneath the waves. Survivors, welcome to the last refuge—an underwater base. Though it appears run down, it provides safety; though scarce, it contains life. Repair equipment, restart the power, and establish a food supply—Provide a spark of hope for humanity in this refuge. In the depths of the base, a slumbering Titan awaits your awakening—it will become humanity's greatest weapon in its fight to retake the planet, the last guardian in this apocalypse.

[Rebuilding the Base: From Survival to New Life]
Utilize every inch of space and restart the old equipment. From basic power generation to sustainable underwater farms, from residential expansion to military production, every step of progress is crucial for survival. Strategically design your base layout, research post-apocalyptic technology, increase resource production, and build a fortress made for survival in the abyss.

[Repair the Titan: Deep-Sea Blade, Born for Battle] Repair the dormant Titan and unlock multiple weapon systems—high-energy torpedoes, pulse cannons, deep-diving slashing blades… Combine and match equipment to fit your playstyle. Push the limits of your Titan in actual combat. Overwhelm hordes of Chimera with massive firepower, enhance mobility and defense, and prepare for the giant Chimera to attack at any time!

[Commander Rally: Female Commanders in Position]
In the apocalypse, you must look everywhere for assistance. There are logistics commanders skilled in resource management, combat commanders skilled in tactics, engineers specialized in Titan development... Each commander brings different upgrades to both the base and your Titan. Match their skills to build an elite team with survivability and combat prowess. Work together to forge a future amidst the abyss and ruins.

[Explore the Ruins: Dive into the Depths and Rediscover Civilization] A sunken city lies beneath the turbulent waves, holding treasures from before the apocalyptic. Organize expedition teams to infiltrate the dangerous ruins. Search for lost energy cores, scarce survival supplies, and lost technological blueprints… Every exploration could uncover the secrets to turning the tides of battle, or it may turn into a surprise attack from deep-sea monsters; High-risk, high-reward.

[Alliance Benefits: Growing Together] In the apocalypse, a lone boat will struggle to survive. Join or create an Alliance to share technology and resources, and coordinate defenses with your fellow survivors. Participate in Alliance Missions, fight against the giant Chimera, and unite to control strategic deep-sea areas. You no longer face the darkness alone—together we will form humanity's strongest line of defense against the abyss.

>>Download now and return to the last refuge of humanity<<

Check out our official community pages for the newest news and detailed information!
Official website: https://tr.ienjoygame.com/
Official Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/people/Titan-Rush/61586521282889
Official Discord: https://discord.gg/4caKTkewPR

apps.title: Backflip Mania

🌟 𝗛𝗶𝗴𝗵𝗹𝗶𝗴𝗵𝘁𝘀
𝗗𝗶𝘃𝗲𝗿𝘀𝗲 𝗘𝗻𝘃𝗶𝗿𝗼𝗻𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁𝘀: Flip through amazing world locations, from urban rooftops and city gym areas to tropical islands and snowy mountains.

𝗥𝗲𝗮𝗹𝗶𝘀𝘁𝗶𝗰 𝗣𝗵𝘆𝘀𝗶𝗰𝘀: Experience a true-to-life 3D physics engine where you must master the Spring tension and Rotation axis to survive. Every jump from the Trampoline bed feels uniquely satisfying.

𝗠𝗮𝘀𝘁𝗲𝗿 𝘁𝗵𝗲 𝗟𝗮𝗻𝗱𝗶𝗻𝗴: It’s not just about the flip—you must hit the Landing zone on your feet or use a Bail out technique to avoid a crash.

𝗖𝗵𝗮𝗿𝗮𝗰𝘁𝗲𝗿 𝗣𝗿𝗼𝗴𝗿𝗲𝘀𝘀: Unlock Airtime mastery and new action animations as you conquer harder levels. Use Progression drills to move from basic stunts to pro-level mastery.

⚡ 𝗚𝗮𝗺𝗲 𝗙𝗲𝗮𝘁𝘂𝗿𝗲𝘀
𝗘𝘅𝘁𝗿𝗲𝗺𝗲 𝗖𝗵𝗮𝗹𝗹𝗲𝗻𝗴𝗲𝘀: Face hundreds of levels where you'll need a perfect Take-off phase and Spotting technique. Execute everything from a Front tuck flip, Back tuck flip, and Side tuck flip to advanced moves like the Wall flip, Webster flip, and Gainer flip.

𝗗𝗶𝘃𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗠𝗼𝗱𝗲: Take the action to the water! Practice your Crash dive flip, Front drop flip, or Back drop flip in special pool and sea environments.

𝗧𝗵𝗲 𝗨𝗹𝘁𝗶𝗺𝗮𝘁𝗲 𝗧𝗿𝗶𝗰𝗸 𝗟𝗶𝘀𝘁: Push your parkour logic to the limit with complex moves. Can you land a Barani flip, Miller flip, Half-in half-out flip, or the legendary Full-in full-out flip?

𝗖𝗿𝗲𝗮𝘁𝗶𝘃𝗲 𝗦𝘁𝘂𝗻𝘁𝘀: Experiment with technical moves like the Cody flip, Kaboom flip, Swivel hips flip, Pullover flip, or a Turntable flip. For those who love twists, try the Arabian flip, Cork flip, or a Double full twist flip.

𝗧𝗲𝗰𝗵𝗻𝗶𝗰𝗮𝗹 𝗣𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝘀𝗶𝗼𝗻: Find the Center point of your jump to pull off a Back pike flip, Side pike flip, or a clean Back layout flip. Whether it's a Seat drop flip, Knee drop flip, or Back handspring flip, your timing is everything.

Offline Fun: Enjoy the adrenaline of a Roundoff flip, Cradle flip, or a B-kick flip anywhere, anytime.

🏆 Do you have what it takes to be the lead?
From the safety of the Frame padding to the peak of a skyscraper, show off your Full twist flip, Standing back flip, and Aerial flip skills. Play 𝗕𝗮𝗰𝗸𝗳𝗹𝗶𝗽 𝗠𝗮𝗻𝗶𝗮 and start your extreme jump journey today!

apps.title: NTE: Neverness to Everness
apps.summary:
NTE is a supernatural open-world RPG developed by Hotta Studio. The story begins in the city of Hethereau, where you play as its first "unlicensed" Anomaly Hunter. You'll join the crew at Eibon, a rundown antique shop that keeps the lights on by taking Anomaly commissions from anyone willing to pay. Alongside a diverse cast of extraordinary companions, you'll unravel urban mysteries, ride out adventures full of laughs and heartbreak, and write your own stories in the neon-lit streets.

◆ Strange City, Strange Adventures

Welcome to the first stop in your appraisal career—Hethereau, a sprawling and vibrant metropolis!

In the crowded halls of the Bureau of Anomaly Control, hopeful Oddities queue up for resident permits, while over at the train station, an Esper commuter snaps his fingers to clean his work suit on the fly. Down one block, a chaotic chase after Danzaburou is spiraling out of control; while across the street, a vacationing silver-gloved Butler is shooting the breeze with the owner of a second-hand electronics shop. Everywhere you look, there's no shortage of intriguingly "abnormal" scenes.

Want to dive deeper into a world where humans and the supernatural coexist? Start your journey in Hethereau to see it for yourself. The lively and quirky daily life here is a grand adventure in itself.

◆ Interesting Stories, Lighthearted Connections

Today's Top Story: Rumors are swirling about a mysterious pawnshop that only appears on the night of the full moon. What would you trade for a wish?

Breaking News: Taygedo's romance crisis! Romance and impulse, heartbreak and missed chances—Miss Tako, the object of a secret crush, is about to leave Hethereau with her guarantor. How will the lovestruck otter get his feelings across before it's too late?

Reliable Insider Tip: Film Orbit Studio is back in business! Members of the Eibon Antique Shop get exclusive discounts!

Weather Update: The Anomaly Rainman is entering an active phase—don't forget your rain gear on the way out!

That wraps up today's 10AM broadcast. Stay tuned for mysterious Anomalies, unbreakable "Oaths," and the ever-growing shadow of the colossal "Circle" organization, looming larger in the fragmented echoes of "Prophecies"...

◆ Encounters and Bonds

Explore hidden shops tucked away in back alleys and meet their enigmatic owners, along with absurdly overpowered bodyguards, "jack-of-all-trades" robotic butlers, troublemakers who can't help finding problems, and TV-headed repairmen with some very curious eating habits.

As part of the Eibon crew, you'll never be short on energetic companions for the road ahead.

Expand your social circle starting from the bustling Hankaku Street! Meet members from different factions and add them as "Bagel" friends!

From the tight-knit neighborhood of street shops to the city's unique hunter organizations, countless side stories await—ready for you to make friends and forge bonds across every corner of Hethereau.

◆ Customize Your Urban Lifestyle

Explore the city on your own terms—stick to familiar routines or shake things up.

Customize your ride and tear through the city streets, or hop on the Ghost Train to cut through Anomaly space and arrive in a flash.

In your downtime, swing by the old shops on Hankaku Street to browse their secret seasonal stock, or buy a cozy little home and deck it out to your liking.

Go at your own pace, follow your instincts, and let Hethereau reward you with colorful days worth remembering.
Follow our official channels for the latest on NTE!

apps.title: Word Associations Now!
apps.summary:
Word Associations Now! perfectly blends word association gameplay with modern vocabulary sorting logic. Designed for strategic thinkers, it offers a clean, elegant, and stress-free linguistic journey.
How to Play:
Organize word cards and match them into the correct categories. There are no time limits and no move counts—plan at your own pace, discover logical connections, and clear the board in a relaxing atmosphere.

Features:
• Innovative Auto-Merge: Smartly recognizes your progress and merges cards automatically, making the sorting process clearer and more satisfying.
• Stress-Free Gameplay: No timers, no move limits. Whether you want to unwind or challenge your mind, enjoy a pure puzzle experience.
• Visual Customization: Multiple color schemes, dark/light modes, and beautiful wallpapers. Supports 3 font sizes for the most comfortable reading experience.
• Satisfying Progression: Earn badges, complete daily tasks, and compete on global leaderboards.
• Daily Challenges: Features 3 difficulty levels and monthly collectible trophies to track your achievements.
• Multilingual Support: Localized in 10+ languages. Long-press any card to trigger the system dictionary for instant definitions.

Download Word Associations Now! today and discover the joy of sorting words with strategy and style.

apps.title: Arrows Puzzle Relax
apps.summary:
🌟 Why choose "Arrows Puzzle Relax"?
Mind Awakening: Challenge logic, planning and spatial perception in the interlacing of arrows - keep your brain active with clever arrow-pulling puzzles.

Immersive decompression: no time limit, no countdown pressure. Develop strategies calmly and enjoy pure thinking in a quiet atmosphere.

Minimalism: The screen design eliminates redundancy and minimizes visual interference, allowing you to fully immerse yourself in the art of puzzle solving.

Take Control: Whether it's a quick 5-minute break or a long commute, it fits your pace perfectly.


🌟 Game highlights: intellectual game, tranquility of mind
Craftsmanship levels: Thousands of hand-polished levels, say goodbye to boring random generation - each level is a unique puzzle-solving experience.

Smooth curve: difficulty gradually increases. From easy to get started to deep brain-burning, it accurately matches your thinking growth, making it challenging but not frustrating.

Pure aesthetics: Simple yet high-end design returns the visual focus to the puzzle itself - focusing on solving the puzzle rather than tedious operations.

Zero-pressure experience: You can think over and over again and try multiple times. There is no step penalty, only the exploration of the optimal path.

Turn on at any time: supports offline play, no matter where you are, your private mental gym is always online.

🌟 Core gameplay: minimalist control, in-depth strategy
Core task: Reasonably plan the order of arrow shooting. Make sure every arrow leaves the field smoothly without any collision.

Intuitive operation: Tap the screen to pull the arrow. The operation is extremely simple, but the depth of the strategy behind it is fascinating.

Multidimensional thinking: Who moves first? Who is the queen? How to get around obstacles? Every simple click is a test of forward planning.

Perfect pass: complete the level with zero collisions and zero mistakes, and attack the logic peak of higher difficulty.

🌟 Intimate function: your puzzle solving companion
Smart Tips: Encountering a bottleneck? Use elimination props to eliminate them directly, which is a shortcut to your victory.

apps.title: Dream Raiders 2: Wilds
apps.summary:
Ready to begin a relaxing idle adventure in another world?
Wait—what?! You’ve been reincarnated as an adorable pet?! Become a mysterious (and irresistibly fluffy) hero in a whimsical fantasy realm, and start your cozy adventure across Dreamland. Set up camp, soak up the sunlight, share drinks, and enjoy a sizzling barbecue with friends—what could be better?

【Effortless Idling, Endless Rewards】
Wake up from a sweet dream—huh? Why is the warehouse overflowing?! Stay tucked under the covers and still earn tons of resources! Level up easily and enjoy shared experience growth across your team. Who says you can’t get stronger while lying down?

【A Laid-back Life in Another World】
Gather resources, craft items, and build your very own home in another world. Sip a little wine, unwind after a long day, and enjoy the slow rhythm of fantasy life!

【Diverse Maps, Relaxed Adventures】
Do you love green meadows where the breeze gently brushes your face? Or would you rather wander along golden beaches, feeling the call of the waves? Maybe the unknown calls to you—mysterious caves, molten cores, or floating islands high above the clouds? Leave real-world worries behind and explore the breathtaking landscapes of Dreamland!

【Stress-free Social Fun at the Camp】
As the campfire crackles and the scent of grilled meat fills the air, lay out your picnic blanket and gather your friends! Try out some exotic delicacies from another world—ever wondered what dragon tail might taste like?

【Hands-Free Combat Anytime, Anywhere】
No complicated controls—just jump into battle with a single tap! Your team fights automatically with dazzling effects, letting you enjoy smooth and exciting combat wherever you are. Sit back, relax, and watch the show!

【Adorable Pets, Endless Variety】
Meet the Dreamies—your cute, fluffy, and loyal friends of all shapes and sizes! Perfect for traveling, exploring, and collecting resources, each Dreamie has unique abilities that boost your power and productivity. Who could resist building a whole nest of adorable companions?

apps.title: Baseball Hits 26
apps.summary:
Baseball Hits 26 is an officially licensed MLB Players, Inc. Game.

⚾PLAY WITH MLBPI SUPERSTARS. ANYTIME, ANYWHERE.
Enter the ballpark, step up to the plate, and experience the thrill of real baseball, officially licensed by MLB Players, Inc. Collect and play with today’s biggest baseball superstars in an easy-to-learn, deeply satisfying mobile baseball game built for fans.

🎮EASY TO PLAY. HARD TO PUT DOWN.
Tap to swing, time it right, and send it deep. Every pitch, hit, and home run feels authentic with lifelike motion-captured animation, realistic baseball physics, and stats based on real-life MLBPI superstars. Whether you’re chasing a clutch hit, the intensity of 9 innings, throwing strikes in Pitching Ace, or crushing moonshots in Homerun King, every swing and pitch delivers that big-league adrenaline.

🧢BUILD YOUR DREAM LINEUP WITH OFFICIAL MLBPI PLAYERS
Recruit and upgrade over 800 official MLBPI baseball superstars! Featuring cover athlete Cal Raleigh, the switch-hitting home run force, alongside five-tool dynamo José Ramírez, generational slugger Juan Soto, power pitcher strikeout ace Tarik Skubal, lightning-fast playmaker Corbin Carroll, and run-producing masher Vladimir Guerrero Jr.

Mix current MLBPI legends with top-ranked rising stars like Jackson Holliday, power-hitting breakout talents like Junior Caminero, and postseason breakout arms like Trey Yesavage to craft the ultimate roster. Level them up, and climb through competitive tiers to prove your lineup belongs among the elite.

🏆COMPETE AND WIN TOGETHER
Join a Club to connect with other fans, chat, and compete through live events and tournaments. Work as a team to earn rewards, climb leaderboards, and rule the diamond. Every win counts, and clubs win bigger together, so go ahead and beat your baseball rivals.

SHORT SESSIONS. BIG MOMENTS.
Designed for mobile, Baseball Hits 26 fits perfectly into your day. Play a quick inning on break or battle through all 9 innings in a full playoff run at night! The pace is fast, the action believable, and every at-bat matters. Play your way:
⚾Hits Mode: Step into the batter's box and lead your team to victory
🔥Pitching Ace: Aim, release, and fool batters with perfect timing
💥Total Baseball: Hit and pitch for the full baseball experience
👑Homerun King: Pure power-hitting fun with streak bonuses
🏆Events & Tournaments: Time-limited challenges with exclusive rewards!

BEAT YOUR BASEBALL RIVALS. CLIMB THE RANKS. BUILD YOUR LEGACY.
Rise from rookie to legend as you progress through tiers, unlock powerful baseball superstars, and chase special edition stars that celebrate the best in the game. Earn reward boxes, collect currency, and keep improving season after season.

A LIVING BASEBALL WORLD WITH OFFICIAL MLBPI PLAYERS
With ongoing live events, player drops, and new content year-round, Baseball Hits 26 is more than a baseball game; it’s your home for authentic baseball action on mobile. Every update brings new challenges, new baseball stars, and new reasons to play.

KEY FEATURES:
⚾Officially licensed by MLB Players, Inc. Real players and real stats
☝️Simple tap-to-swing and tap-to-pitch gameplay
💥Authentic baseball physics and motion-captured animations
📈Deep roster-building and player progression
🏆Clubs, leaderboards, and live competitions
💎Free-to-play with optional in-app purchases

Baseball Hits 26 is EASY to play, FUN to master, and BUILT FOR BASEBALL FANS.⚾

JOIN THE CLUBHOUSE!
Get the latest news and celebrate big wins on our official Baseball Hits 26 Discord. We’d love your feedback as we continue to build the most fun, authentic baseball experience on mobile

apps.title: Rebel Glam: Dress Up Games
apps.summary:
Every heart holds a magnificent spark, ready to shine. Your creativity, unique style, and confidence deserve a radiant place to glow.
Welcome to Rebel Glam, an inspiring fashion simulation where beauty and imagination come to life. This is more than ordinary dress up games—it is a glorious celebration of self-expression and artistic design. Discover vibrant aesthetics, explore global trends, and create exquisite outfits that reflect your authentic personality.

From E-Girl energy to Red Carpet glamour, every style you design becomes a triumphant moment. Enjoy the freedom to master the art of fashion, makeup, and magical makeover transformations that make every avatar feel truly special.

✂️ DESIGN & CUSTOMIZE YOUR STYLE
Why follow trends when you can curate your own? Explore a massive wardrobe of Y2K fashion, gothic chic, and luxury couture. Cut custom patterns, dye fabrics with vibrant colors, and stitch unique silhouettes to mix and match textures. Customize every detail of your avatar—from stunning hairstyles to professional makeup combinations.

👗 IMMERSIVE CREATIVE DRESS UP GAMES
If you love creative dress up games, Rebel Queen offers endless inspiration. Engage in deep styling mechanics, experiment with fresh outfits, and enjoy relaxing fashion challenges. Each new look you design becomes a vital part of your personal fashion journey.

💄 MASTER THE MAKEUP & MAKEOVER MAGIC
Express your artistry with professional makeup tools and complete beauty makeover features. Blend colorful eyeshadows, contour with highlights, and style iconic hair designs. Every makeover helps transform your model into a confident fashion icon through realistic cosmetic simulation.

📸 CAPTURE & SHARE STUNNING MOMENTS
Pose your model in immersive scenes and capture high-definition photos. Add creative filters, fun stickers, and share your favorite fashion looks with the global community. Celebrate your creativity, gain Aura Points, and inspire others with your beautiful masterpieces.

Create amazing outfits, master stylish makeup, and let your inner brilliance shine brighter than ever.

apps.title: Last Furry: Survival
apps.summary:
A cataclysmic conspiracy has released toxic fog over the once-vibrant planet Furry, plunging it into apocalyptic chaos. Many have perished, while others mutated into savage monsters. The remaining survivors now fight for their lives in this toxic wasteland — with scarce resources, suffocating air, and relentless beast attacks.

As Commander, YOU are destined to lead these survivors. Your strategic prowess and unyielding courage will be crucial in establishing a shelter, purifying the land, and combating the spreading toxic fog. Rally your people to rebuild civilization from the ashes and conquer the ultimate survival challenge!

[Game Features]

BUILD & MANAGE YOUR SHELTER
Transform ruins into a thriving refuge! Every decision counts—manage food supplies, purify toxic air, provide medical care, and fortify against threats. Your strategic planning and resource management will decide if your shelter flourishes or falls under the toxic fog.

LIVING, BREATHING SURVIVORS
Each survivor brings unique emotions, backstories, and personalities to your shelter. They'll show joy when comfortable, despair when hungry, and gratitude when protected. Through personal letters and dynamic interactions, you'll resolve conflicts, earn loyalty, and create unbreakable bonds with those you protect.

HIGH-STAKES EXPLORATION
Venture beyond safety into the toxic unknown! Lead squads to gather vital resources and salvage forgotten technologies. But beware—mutated beasts and hostile factions lurk in the toxic fog, making every exploration a high-risk, high-reward venture.

RECRUIT TALENTED HEROES
Find and recruit remarkable heroes with unique abilities! Build an elite team of specialists—fearsome warriors who excel in combat, brilliant engineers who boost development, and mysterious figures with powers that can change fate itself. Upgrade their gear, enhance their skills, and unleash their full potential!

FORM POWERFUL ALLIANCE
Survival requires unity! Create alliances to trade essential resources, share critical intelligence, and stand together against formidable threats. Join forces with other Commanders to push back the toxic fog and reclaim your broken world.

ENDLESS CHALLENGES
Encounter constantly evolving threats that demand your leadership! Plan explorations, develop purification strategies, issue impactful decrees, and tackle unexpected crises. Every decision shapes not just survival, but the future of civilization itself.

The toxic fog still chokes the land, but hope refuses to die.

Commander, will you lead humanity into a new dawn?

Download now and fight for the future!

Welcome to the official social media page of Last Furry to discover more exciting content:
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/lastfurrysurvival
Discord: https://discord.gg/EQb6jk7HNX
Email: lastfurry@staruniongame.com
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/lastfurrysurvival/

apps.title: Pop Epoch: Civilization Tycoon
apps.summary:
🔥 Ignite Your Journey: From Primitive Wilds to Modern Marvels in Minutes!

Ready, Set, Epoch!

Welcome to Pop Epoch, where you become the architect of history! Dive into an exhilarating adventure, starting from primitive beginnings and racing through time to see the world reshape at your command.

👑 Rule Your Epochs
-Begin in the primitive wilderness, leading your tribe to greatness.
-Innovate, construct, and produce resources to propel your world toward new heights.
-Your strategic decisions will steer the course of history, balancing vital resources, industrial expansion, and military prowess.

🌟 Encounter Legends
-Defy time and meet iconic figures: Archimedes, Shakespeare, Joan of Arc, Socrates…
-Forge alliances and harness their unique skills and wisdom to make your world shine through the ages.

🚀 Propel Through Progress
-Harness the power of technology to drive your epoch forward.
-Master groundbreaking research and innovation, staying ahead of rivals as you pave the way to future milestones.

⚔️ Strength in Unity
-A formidable military is the backbone of progress.
-Command infantry, cavalry, and more to defend your realm, conquer foes, and ensure your legacy’s dominance across time
